creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
On Thu, 19 Apr 2007, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Please note that PR ports/111906 has just been submitted.

I have been following a policy of only updating the p5-Image-ExifTool port 
when a new "production release" is designated by the author, Phil Harvey.

According to http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html,
the current port version is the latest production release.

I would prefer to hold off updating the port until the next production 
release is announced, unless there is a compelling reason to upgrade 
before then.

Thanks,
-- 
Tod McQuillin
